problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Attention. Attention mechanism with linear complexity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
